v0.2-Beta.description:
# Armored Core 6 Archipelago — v0.2-Beta

# Changes

- Added: Shop checks — purchases now count as check locations.
- Added: In-game connection GUI — press F8 to connect or change room without relaunching.
- Added: COAM filler item.
- Added: Logic gates and spheres. Shop checks have the same sphere logic as their respective chapter.
- Fixed: FCS and generators now grant the correct part.

## Features

- 300+ Weapons and gear to receive.
- Checks sent from mission clears, arenas, and mercenary ranks.

## Known Issues

- No on-screen pickup notification — check your AP client; parts show in the
  assembly menu.
- Archive Logs is experimental (collection flags still being verified).
- Must launch through ModEngine2, not Steam directly.
- When closing, crashing, or returning to garage from a mission causes all items gained during that mission to vanish.

## Compatibility

Built and tested on **AC6 App Ver. 1.09.1** with **ModEngine 2.1.0**. Other
versions may break.

## Credits

**easywsclient**, **ModEngine2**, and **Archipelago**.
v0.2-Beta.title: v0.2-Beta

v0.2.1-Beta.description:
# Armored Core 6 Archipelago — v0.2.1-Beta

# Changes

- **Fixed**: Mercenary Rank checks corrected from 17 to 15.
- **Fixed**: Shops opening up at wrong points.
- **Fixed**: Missions sending the wrong checks.
- **Changed**: Increased the price of shop Items.

## Known Issues

- Must launch through ModEngine2, not Steam directly.
- When closing, crashing, or returning to garage from a mission causes all items gained during that mission to vanish.

## Compatibility

Built and tested on **AC6 App Ver. 1.09.1** with **ModEngine 2.1.0**. Other
versions may break.

## Credits
**easywsclient**, **ModEngine2**, and **Archipelago**.
v0.2.1-Beta.title: v0.2.1-Beta
